drift_summary: The live product, strategy, and messaging docs are currently in sync with the approved source artifacts, but they should be refreshed after every release or claim-shaping improvement.
review_requirements: Run AI review on unsupported capability claims, weak differentiation, and vague proof language.
Run AI test checks on doc metadata, required sections, and source-artifact linkage.
Complete targeted PM Leader manual validation before reusing the messaging bundle for broader publication.
next_action: Use this bundle as the default ProductOS product, strategy, and messaging surface while routing future claim changes through the same sync state.
